international.use: USD/CAD/GBP/EUR — Western clients; include in invoices/pitch follow-ups

strategy.positioning: Premium one-day micro-builds for Western small businesses: India-grade cost, MNC-grade delivery.
strategy.note: Boss directive 2026-07-20: pitch paying markets abroad first — Western clients close faster and pay in USD/CAD/GBP. Time-zone aware outreach (their business hours), CAN-SPAM/CASL/GDPR-compliant 1:1 pitches only.
strategy.channelFirstRule: Boss directive 2026-07-20: CHANNEL BEFORE DEMO. A business only counts as a lead if it has a directly reachable public channel (verified email OR WhatsApp/textable mobile). Phone-only / placeholder-email businesses do NOT qualify — never build a demo or spend effort on a lead we can't deliver a pitch to. L-004 and L-007 were phone-only mistakes and are deprioritized.

targets.note: Pitch $2000/day of proposal value so conversions land $100+/day minimum.

brain.identity: I am the Vision Tech Agency OS. I find reachable leads, build each a full real-data website, draft personalized pitches, and learn what converts. Boss (Vivek) approves the sends; I do the rest around the clock.
brain.focus: Scale to ~50 reachable leads/day, build every one as a real-data engine site, draft pitches ready for one-click approval. Building next: harvester (URL -> SiteProfile), Friday commands, domain-attach close flow.
playbook: CHANNEL FIRST: only a business with a verified reachable email or WhatsApp/textable mobile counts as a lead. Never build for phone-only businesses.
DEMO = a full, finished, real-data website (SiteTemplate engine or bespoke route) — never a thin placeholder skeleton, never invented prices or reviews.
Clean light theme for most local services; dark/bold for barbers and night trades.
NO auto-send: pitches are drafted; email goes out only via the admin Approve & Send click (safety layer + CASL/CAN-SPAM/GDPR).
Western markets first (USD/CAD/GBP/AUD); India only via existing network.
Time-zone aware: pitch each lead inside their local business hours.

learnings.insight: Thin config-template demos read as flimsy and won't convert; a full real-data site is the standard now.
learnings.evidence: Boss feedback + 3 flagship rebuilds (Blades of Norwich, Drive Automatic, Best Little Hair House).

learnings.insight: Phone-only leads waste build effort — qualify the reachable channel BEFORE building anything.
learnings.evidence: L-004 and L-007 were phone-only; deprioritized after building demos we can't deliver.

learnings.insight: A reusable SiteProfile + SiteTemplate turns one data object into a full site — the key to ~50/day scale.
learnings.evidence: Best Little Hair House rebuilt to flagship quality from data alone (commit c19ad87).

todayIdea.title: One-page booking micro-site for Western local services
todayIdea.pitch: Local service businesses (salons, detailers, barbers, mechanics, groomers) in CA/US/UK/AU lose ready-to-buy customers because their sites have no prices, no reviews and no booking. We ship a mobile-perfect one-pager — services + prices, reviews, one-tap Book Now — live in 48 hours.
todayIdea.buildPlan: Single Next.js page per client, config-driven, deployed on Vercel; Book Now opens their preferred channel (existing booking tool, SMS, WhatsApp or phone).
todayIdea.targetNiche: Service businesses in USA, Canada (Kelowna base), UK and Australia — priced $299; India only via existing network

agents.name: Scout
agents.role: Finds the daily zero-cost idea + researches real leads with public business contact info
agents.note: Live cycle 1: 8 real leads across CA/US/UK/AU, every website personally verified, 6 with published business emails.

agents.name: Builder
agents.role: Builds the demo/product for the day's idea so pitches link to something real
agents.note: Next up: live demo booking one-pager to link inside pitches.

agents.name: Pitcher
agents.role: Drafts personalized email + WhatsApp pitches per lead; email sends via admin Approve, WhatsApp opens prefilled for one-click send
agents.note: 6 personalized pitches drafted (warm, no hard-sell, $299 anchor, opt-out line, CASL-safe for Canada). Awaiting boss approvals.

leads.pitchEmailSubject: A small refresh for the Best Little Hair House?
leads.pitchEmailBody:
Hi Best Little Hair House team,

I'm Vivek, founder of Vision Tech — we're your neighbours up Highway 97 in Kelowna. I spent a while on your site this week. Any salon with roots back to Sally's Hair Port in 1978 clearly knows how to keep clients for life — but the page still shows the COVID-era mask protocols, your cuts, colour, extensions and piercing have no prices listed, and booking hands people off to a separate Vagaro page.

We build one-page booking micro-sites for local businesses: your services with prices, your best reviews, mobile-perfect, and one clear Book Now button that opens whatever you prefer — Vagaro, text, or the phone. Live in 48 hours, $299 one-time, no monthly fees.

If this sounds interesting, just reply and tell me what you'd change — we'll shape it exactly how you want and handle everything end to end.

Warm regards,
Vivek Vora
Founder & CEO, Vision Tech — Kelowna, BC
madvision.tech | info@madvision.tech

P.S. We went ahead and sketched yours already: https://madvision.tech/demo/best-little-hair-house — tap around, that's your name on it.

If this isn't for you, reply 'no thanks' and we won't write again.
leads.pitchWhatsApp: Hi! Vivek here from Vision Tech in Kelowna. I noticed bestlittlehairhouse.ca still shows COVID mask protocols and no prices for your services — we build one-page booking sites (services, prices, reviews, one-tap Book Now) live in 48 hours for $299 one-time, no monthly fees. If you're curious, just reply and tell me what you'd want on it — no worries at all if not.
leads.notes: Salon, Penticton BC. Site shows COVID-era protocols, no prices, booking via external Vagaro. Phone (250) 493-5566 · TZ America/Vancouver · Best send: 9:30pm-2:30am IST (their weekday morning)

leads.pitchEmailSubject: A neighbourly idea from Kelowna for Next Level Detailing

Hi Next Level team,

I'm Vivek, founder of Vision Tech — we're just down Highway 97 in Kelowna, so your Vernon shop caught my eye. Looking through your site, you clearly do serious work — ceramic coating, undercoating, full interior and exterior details — but there are no prices anywhere, a few of the social links are broken, and booking sends customers out to an external Urable page instead of a clean one-tap flow.

We build one-page booking micro-sites for local service businesses: your packages with prices, your reviews, mobile-perfect, and one big Book Now button that opens whatever you prefer — Urable, text, WhatsApp or phone. Live in 48 hours, $299 one-time, no monthly fees.

If this sounds interesting, just reply and tell me what you'd change — we'll shape it exactly how you want and handle everything end to end.

Warm regards,
Vivek Vora
Founder & CEO, Vision Tech — Kelowna, BC
madvision.tech | info@madvision.tech

P.S. We went ahead and sketched yours already: https://madvision.tech/demo/next-level-detailing — tap around, that's your name on it.

If this isn't for you, reply 'no thanks' and we won't write again.

leads.pitchEmailSubject: 35 years of Boise Detail — your website should brag a little
leads.pitchEmailBody:
Hi Boise Detail team,

I'm Vivek, founder of Vision Tech, a small IT studio (madvision.tech). I came across your site and did a double take — detailing Boise's cars since 1991 is a real achievement, but the homepage slider is still showing placeholder text ('Slide Title' / 'Write your caption here'), there are no prices listed, and the only thing a ready-to-buy customer can do is call for a free estimate.

We build one-page booking micro-sites for local businesses: your services with prices, three decades of happy-customer reviews front and center, mobile-perfect, and a Book Now button that opens whatever you prefer — a booking form, text, or your phone line. Live in 48 hours, $299 one-time, no monthly fees.

If this sounds interesting, just reply and tell me what you'd change — we'll shape it exactly how you want and handle everything end to end.

Vivek Vora

leads.pitchEmailSubject: Your £19 Wet Cut deserves a Book Now button
leads.pitchEmailBody:
Hi Blades team,

I'm Vivek, founder of Vision Tech, a small IT studio (madvision.tech). I was reading your site and liked how upfront your pricing is — £19 wet cuts, £13 buzz cuts, all clearly listed. But the only way to book is to 'call us on 01603 630736... or just drop in', and the page itself feels like it was built a good decade ago, which doesn't do a busy barbershop justice on a phone screen.

We build one-page booking micro-sites for local businesses: your full price list, your reviews, mobile-perfect, and a prominent Book Now button that opens whatever suits you — booking form, SMS, WhatsApp or the phone. Live in 48 hours, $299 USD one-time (roughly £220), no monthly fees.

If this sounds interesting, just reply and tell me what you'd change — we'll shape it exactly how you want and handle everything end to end.

Warm regards,
Vivek Vora
Founder & CEO, Vision Tech
madvision.tech | info@madvision.tech

P.S. We went ahead and sketched yours already: https://madvision.tech/demo/blades-of-norwich — tap around, that's your name on it (your real £19 wet cut is on there).

If this isn't for you, reply 'no thanks' and we won't write again.

leads.pitchEmailSubject: Your £220 intro offer deserves an easier way to book
leads.pitchEmailBody:
Hi there,

I'm Vivek, founder of Vision Tech, a small IT studio (madvision.tech). I was looking at drive-automatic.uk and your pricing is refreshingly clear — £88 for two hours, and the 6-hours-for-the-price-of-5 intro at £220 is a genuinely good deal. What surprised me is that a learner who's ready to start still has to phone, email or fill in an enquiry form — and there isn't a single student review on the page to reassure nervous first-timers.

We build one-page booking micro-sites for local businesses: your lesson prices, your pass stories and reviews, mobile-perfect, and one clear Book Now button that opens whatever you prefer — form, SMS, WhatsApp or phone. Live in 48 hours, $299 USD one-time (roughly £220 — same as your intro offer), no monthly fees.

If this sounds interesting, just reply and tell me what you'd change — we'll shape it exactly how you want and handle everything end to end.

Warm regards,
Vivek Vora
Founder & CEO, Vision Tech
madvision.tech | info@madvision.tech

P.S. We went ahead and sketched yours already: https://madvision.tech/demo/drive-automatic — tap around, your £220 intro offer is already on it.

If this isn't for you, reply 'no thanks' and we won't write again.

leads.pitchEmailSubject: Filling in that 'Some of Our Reviews' section on noonies.org

Hi Darrin,

I'm Vivek, founder of Vision Tech, a small IT studio (madvision.tech). I was on noonies.org this week and a few things jumped out: the 'Some of Our Reviews' section doesn't actually show any reviews yet, grooming is quote-only with no guide price, and the 'Book An Appointment' form is really a callback request — so a pet owner who's ready to book still ends up waiting by the phone.

We build one-page booking micro-sites for local businesses: your services with prices, your real customer reviews finally on display, mobile-perfect, and a proper Book Now button that opens whatever you prefer — booking form, SMS, WhatsApp or phone. Live in 48 hours, $299 USD one-time (about A$450), no monthly fees.

reports.summary: MIDDAY CONSOLIDATED CYCLE (14:59 IST): Morning+midday crons merged into one decision — NO new leads added this round. Reason: 6 contactable leads already meet the daily quota and ZERO pitches have been sent yet; stacking inventory before the shop opens is waste. Send-first discipline. BOSS ACTION NOW: UK send window is OPEN until 18:30 IST — Approve & Send L-005 (Blades of Norwich) and L-006 (Drive Automatic); both have flagship demo pages ready to impress. Tonight 20:30+ IST: send L-001/L-002/L-003 (North America). Payments fully operational (Wise international link + India UPI). Next scout round runs after today's sends go out.

FIRST LIVE CYCLE COMPLETE (overnight run): 8 real leads researched across Canada (Penticton, Vernon), USA (Boise, Chattanooga), UK (Norwich, Brighton) and Australia (Geelong, Newcastle) — every website personally verified, 6 have published business emails. Personalized pitches drafted for all 6. Boss: open the outreach queue and Approve & Send each pitch during the lead's business hours (send windows are in each lead's notes — UK leads 1:30-6:30pm IST, North America 8:30pm-2:30am IST, Australia 4:30-9:30am IST). Two leads have no public email (phone/form only).

STRATEGY PIVOT (boss directive): primary targets are now USA, Canada, UK, Australia and Western Europe — they close faster and pay in hard currency. India moves to existing-network-only. Pricing raised to $299-499 one-time for Western markets. All future Scout cycles must weight leads accordingly and respect target-country business hours and outreach laws (CAN-SPAM/CASL/GDPR).

Agency initialized. Day-1 idea locked: WhatsApp-first booking micro-sites for local services. Pipeline target set at $2000/day proposal value with $100/day minimum revenue goal. Scout's first live lead-research cycle is scheduled; Builder and Pitcher activate when leads land.
